directives.title: Build RFQ send tracker and status dashboard
directives.task: Create tools/rfq-generator/rfq_tracker.py that manages the full RFQ lifecycle. Read all .txt files from tools/rfq-generator/drafts/. Maintain tools/rfq-generator/rfq_status.json tracking each RFQ with: contact, company, category, est_value_usd, status (DRAFTED|SENT|RESPONDED|AWARDED|DECLINED), sent_date, response_date, quoted_price, notes. Produce tools/rfq-generator/rfq_status_report.md showing pipeline summary, total value per status bucket, next actions. Pre-populate: Baker Hughes VIB_MON = RESPONDED ($340K Apr 10 2026), all 6 drafted RFQs = DRAFTED.
directives.context: 6 RFQ drafts in tools/rfq-generator/drafts/. Baker Hughes $340K responded. Tracker shows total pipeline value and next actions.

directives.title: Build supplier intelligence profiles for top 10 strategic suppliers
directives.task: Create tools/supplier-intelligence/supplier_profiles.md with 1-page intelligence profiles for: GE Vernova, Siemens Energy, ABB Power, Emerson Power, Donaldson Company, Baker Hughes TPS, CECO Environmental, Eaton Electrical, Flowserve, EthosEnergy. Each profile: overview, relevant BOP products, key contacts known, lead times, W251 references, recommended outreach approach. No external API calls — use existing knowledge.
directives.context: Project Jupiter 50MW W251B8 BOP procurement. Top-tier suppliers across STRATEGIC spend categories.

directives.title: Build BOP cost model with 3-scenario analysis
directives.task: Create tools/pricing-discovery/bop_cost_model.py that generates tools/pricing-discovery/outputs/bop_cost_model.csv with: category, bom_low, bom_mid, bom_high, rfq_quoted, rfq_variance_pct, confidence, spend_tier, preferred_supplier, avoid_supplier, scenario_optimistic (low*0.95), scenario_base (mid), scenario_pessimistic (high*1.10). VIB_MON rfq_quoted=340000. Summary row with totals. Also produce outputs/bop_scenario_summary.md with 3-scenario comparison table.
directives.context: All 19 BOM categories. Baker Hughes VIB_MON quoted $340K. Scenarios: optimistic $7.49M / base $9.27M / pessimistic $11.73M.

directives.title: Generate 3-touch outreach sequences for top 8 W251 contacts
directives.task: Create tools/contact-verifier/outreach_sequences/ directory with 8 .md files — one per contact. Each file has Touch 1 (initial RFQ), Touch 2 (day 5 follow-up, add urgency), Touch 3 (day 10 final, pivot offer). Contacts: Lorenzo Simonelli (BH CEO), Bob Yeager (Emerson), Tod Carpenter (Donaldson), Michael Wynblatt (Donaldson), Rod Christie (BH EVP), Harrison K (Amerex), Neil Ashford (Turbotect), Alberto Malandra (EthosEnergy). Sign as Greg Buchanan, CEO Trans World Power.
directives.context: C-suite appropriate. Reference W251B8, Project Jupiter, Santa Teresa NM, Oracle/OpenAI campus. EthosEnergy sequence references MOU March 13 2026 and Todd Dunlop.

directives.title: Track A dashboard audit — Overview page hardening
directives.task: Audit frontend/app/dashboard/overview/page.tsx against Track A standards. Verify and fix: (1) ExecSignalBand primary signal is unmistakable and DO NOW variant fires when RFQ is ready, (2) All KpiCards have accurate sub-labels in plain English with no procurement jargon, (3) DataState handles all 7 states cleanly — loading, empty, error, deferred, partial, stale, live, (4) TermHelper is applied to BOP, RFQ, W251, and other domain terms on first use, (5) No broken or degraded visual states. Write the corrected page.tsx to tools/track-a-review/overview_hardened.tsx — do NOT modify the frontend directly.
directives.context: Track A standard: executive 5-second scan, zero-training readability, top-signal dominance. UI baseline 2111282 locked. Output goes to tools/track-a-review/ for Grok review before promotion.

directives.title: Track A dashboard audit — RFQ Pipeline page hardening
directives.task: Audit frontend/app/dashboard/rfq-pipeline/page.tsx against Track A standards. Same criteria as D58-001. Verify: ExecSignalBand fires 'X RFQ Ready — Send Now' as primary DO NOW signal, KpiCards show pipeline value and status counts clearly, RfqDetailPanel shows contact + category + value + status with zero-training labels. Write corrected page to tools/track-a-review/rfq_pipeline_hardened.tsx.
directives.context: Track A standard. RFQ pipeline is the highest-action page — must drive send decisions immediately. Baker Hughes $340K responded. 6 RFQs ready to send.

directives.title: Track A dashboard audit — Supplier Network + Cost Intel hardening
directives.task: Audit both frontend/app/dashboard/supplier-network/page.tsx and frontend/app/dashboard/cost-intel/page.tsx. For Supplier Network: verify Trillium AVOID is unmistakable, tier distribution is scannable, contact count + verification status are clear. For Cost Intel: verify Trillium AVOID on Piping & Valves is the primary alert, ESTIMATED vs VERIFIED distinction is explicit and color-coded, total BOP mid $9.274M is the dominant number. Write corrected pages to tools/track-a-review/supplier_network_hardened.tsx and tools/track-a-review/cost_intel_hardened.tsx.
directives.context: Track A standard. Trillium AVOID must be impossible to miss on both pages. ESTIMATED/VERIFIED labeling must be explicit — never ambiguous.
